specs.section_path: > 5.2 Embodied SCPN: Cellular, Neural, & Systemic Implementation > I. The Traumatised Brain: Catastrophic Disruption of the SCPN Architecture > 4. L5 Disruption (The Fragmented Self and Dissonance):
source_formulae: P0R05066: 4. L5 Disruption (The Fragmented Self and Dissonance):
P0R05067: The integration of the Self (O) collapses, leading to Dissonance.
P0R05068: -Collapse (Loss of Consciousness): Integrated Information drops drastically (<Crit), resulting in altered consciousness or coma.
P0R05070: Fig.: Integration collapse. (t)\Phi(t)(t) declines after TBI; morphine produces an additional reduction (sedation), risking deep subcriticality when combined with TBI-induced dyscritia.
P0R05071: Free Energy Surge (High F): The system experiences massive, uncontrolled Prediction Errors (Pain, Disorientation), resulting in extremely high Variational Free Energy (F).

P0R05073: Fig.: Free-energy surge and relief. F(t)F(t)F(t) spikes after TBI (high-precision nociceptive error/surprise), then falls with morphine as precision-weighting of ascending errors is reduced (analgesia).

P0R05074: Geometric Distortion (Suffering): The Consciousness Manifold (M) fragments. Topological complexity (bk) decreases, and the curvature becomes highly negative (extreme negative valence/suffering).
